evals.prompt:
Run a full audit of my Google Ads account. Here's the data:

```json
{"account": {"name": "Bay Area Dog Resort", "id": "9876543210", "currency": "USD", "timezone": "America/Los_Angeles", "auto_tagging": true},
"campaigns": [{"name": "Brand", "spend": 800, "clicks": 420, "impressions": 5200, "conversions": 38, "cpa": 21.05, "ctr": 8.1, "budget_lost_is": 5, "rank_lost_is": 10}, {"name": "Dog Boarding", "spend": 3200, "clicks": 580, "impressions": 14000, "conversions": 22, "cpa": 145.45, "ctr": 4.1, "budget_lost_is": 35, "rank_lost_is": 25}, {"name": "Dog Grooming", "spend": 1500, "clicks": 390, "impressions": 8800, "conversions": 28, "cpa": 53.57, "ctr": 4.4, "budget_lost_is": 12, "rank_lost_is": 15}],
"keywords": [{"campaign": "Dog Boarding", "keyword": "dog boarding near me", "spend": 1100, "clicks": 180, "conversions": 12, "qs": 7}, {"keyword": "luxury dog hotel", "campaign": "Dog Boarding", "spend": 900, "clicks": 120, "conversions": 2, "qs": 4}, {"keyword": "cheap dog boarding", "campaign": "Dog Boarding", "spend": 650, "clicks": 140, "conversions": 0, "qs": 3}, {"keyword": "dog kennel jobs", "campaign": "Dog Boarding", "spend": 280, "clicks": 65, "conversions": 0, "qs": 2}, {"keyword": "dog grooming san francisco", "campaign": "Dog Grooming", "spend": 800, "clicks": 210, "conversions": 20, "qs": 9}],
"conversion_actions": [{"name": "Phone Call", "type": "PHONE_CALL", "status": "ENABLED"}, {"name": "Form Submit", "type": "WEBPAGE", "status": "ENABLED"}],
"search_terms": [{"term": "dog boarding san francisco", "clicks": 45, "conversions": 8, "spend": 270}, {"term": "how to start a dog boarding business", "clicks": 32, "conversions": 0, "spend": 190}, {"term": "dog boarding prices", "clicks": 28, "conversions": 3, "spend": 140}],
"ads_per_group": {"Dog Boarding - General": 1, "Dog Grooming - SF": 3}}
```
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive audit with a scorecard covering all 7 dimensions. Should identify: Dog Boarding campaign has 35% budget-lost IS (severe constraint) AND 25% rank-lost IS (both dimensions problematic). 'cheap dog boarding' and 'dog kennel jobs' are waste ($930 combined, 0 conversions). 'luxury dog hotel' has QS 4 and poor CPA. Dog Boarding ad group has only 1 RSA (needs more). Conversion tracking exists but is basic (no enhanced conversions). Should recommend adding 'dog boarding san francisco' as keyword (8 conversions). Should flag 'how to start a dog boarding business' as negative.
expectations: Produces a scorecard table with all 7 health dimensions scored
Identifies Dog Boarding campaign's impression share problem using the 2x2 matrix (budget-lost 35% + rank-lost 25%)
Identifies 'cheap dog boarding' ($650, 0 conv) and 'dog kennel jobs' ($280, 0 conv) as wasted spend with specific dollar amounts
Flags 'luxury dog hotel' QS 4 as needing quality improvement
Notes Dog Boarding ad group has only 1 RSA and recommends adding more
Recommends adding 'dog boarding san francisco' as a keyword (8 conversions from search terms)
Recommends adding 'how to start a dog boarding business' as a negative keyword
Top 3 actions section is present with dollar amounts and expected impact

evals.prompt:
Audit my Google Ads account. Here's the data:

```json
{"account": {"name": "Quick Print Co", "id": "1112223334", "currency": "USD"},
"campaigns": [{"name": "All Services", "spend": 2500, "clicks": 800, "impressions": 20000, "conversions": 0, "cpa": null, "ctr": 4.0}],
"conversion_actions": [],
"keywords": [{"keyword": "printing services", "spend": 800, "clicks": 260, "conversions": 0, "qs": 5}, {"keyword": "business cards", "spend": 600, "clicks": 200, "conversions": 0, "qs": 6}]}
```
evals.expected_output: The audit should immediately flag that conversion tracking is completely missing (no conversion actions at all). This should be rated Critical (score 0) on the conversion tracking dimension. The entire $2500 in spend cannot be evaluated for ROI. The #1 recommendation must be to set up conversion tracking before any other optimization.
expectations: Flags missing conversion tracking as the #1 critical issue
Scores conversion tracking dimension as 0 or Critical
States that the $2500 spend cannot be evaluated without conversion tracking
Recommends setting up conversion tracking as the first action before any keyword or bid optimization
Does not recommend bid or keyword changes since there's no conversion data to base decisions on
